title: [FIRRTL] Add NonLocalAnchor verifier
body:
PR to Ensure the `NonLocalAnchor` is legal.
This commit updates the `FIRRTL::CircuitOp` verifier to verify the `NonLocalAnchor` op.
The verifier checks that `NLA` `namepath` is a valid instance path, and the 
final element is either on a `Module` or an `inner_sym`.
Each element of the `namepath` must contain a `circt.nonlocal` annotation which 
refers back tot he `NLA`.
Other PRs that have been split out (since this PR was created) : 
1. Add the data structure for recording NLAs, https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2573
2. Fix the lit tests, to have legal NLAs, https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2545
3. Handle NLAs on bundle fields. https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2513
